meta.title: Contact Us | Starter App
meta.description: Get in touch with us for questions and support.

contact.description: Have questions or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.form_subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.
contact.social_subtitle: Stay updated with our latest news on social media

response_time.title: Quick Response
response_time.description: We aim to respond to every message within 24 hours on business days.

working_hours.title: Working Hours
working_hours.description: Monday - Friday: 09:00 - 18:00 AEST. Weekends: By priority.

support.title: Ongoing Support
support.description: Our support team is always ready to help resolve your technical issues.
